citation_and_locator: Hara, Yurie. 2015. Alternatives in Cantonese: Disjunctions, Questions and (Un)conditionals. Proceedings of the 20th Amsterdam Colloquium, 177–186
what_it_supports: `ding6` as interrogative disjunction; `waak6ze2` as standard disjunction with broader distribution; alternative versus yes/no/open question behavior; `hai6` in `ding6hai6` omissible in casual speech; rating-study evidence.
limit: One formal study; exact register, prosody, elliptical alternatives, and all particle combinations require broader speaker evidence.

citation_and_locator: Huang, Yu-hsin, One-soon Her, and Stano Kong. 2025. Revisiting the Taxonomy of Interrogatives in Cantonese. Tsing Hua Journal of Chinese Studies 55(1):157–195. DOI 10.6503/THJCS.202503_55(1).0005
what_it_supports: Information-seeking versus confirmation-seeking taxonomy; overt disjunctive and A-not-A questions as related information-seeking types; selected final-particle associations.
limit: Broad taxonomy does not establish that distinct surface constructions should share one parser label or all particles are exclusive to one question type.

citation_and_locator: Wong, Anita M.-Y., C. C.-H. Cheung, J. M.-W. Lo, and E. K.-H. Wan. 2022. Grammatical Analysis of Cantonese Samples, in Understanding Development and Disorder in Cantonese Using Language Sample Analysis; grammatical overview example [79]
what_it_supports: Defines alternative questions as choice questions joining alternatives with `ding6hai6` or short `ding6`; supplies a nominal-alternative example.
limit: Descriptive framework, not a dedicated acceptability, answerhood, register, or formal-semantic study.

citation_and_locator: Law, Ann. 2001. A-not-A Questions in Cantonese. UCL Working Papers in Linguistics 13:295–318; pp. 296–299 and 308–310
what_it_supports: A-not-A provides affirmative/negative alternatives via reduplication and negation; argues against derivation from overt coordination; documents Cantonese form and quantifier/focus boundaries.
limit: A-not-A study does not itself define the full `ding6(hai6)` distribution.
